meta.title: Havenkvist Tech – Freelance Software Consultant in Denmark
meta.description: Freelance software consultant based in Haslev, Denmark. I help businesses across Denmark with bug fixes, feature development, integrations, and custom software — from quick ad-hoc work to full projects.

hero.title: We build software that
hero.subtitle: Havenkvist Tech is a freelance software consultancy designing, building, and extending software with modern technology — from bug fixes and new features to complete, custom-built solutions, with a focus on scalability and usability.

intro.label: Why Havenkvist Tech
intro.title: Technical craft meets business understanding
intro.body: I combine modern software engineering with a clear understanding of what actually drives your business forward — whether the job is fixing a bug, shipping a new feature, or building something new from scratch.

points.title: Fixes what you already have
points.body: Bug fixes, updates, and new features for existing sites and systems — you don't need to start from scratch to get help.

meta.title: About – Freelance Software Consultant in Haslev
meta.description: Meet Lucas, fullstack developer and the person behind Havenkvist Tech. Based in Haslev, Denmark, solving software problems — from bug fixes to custom-built systems — for businesses across Denmark.

hero.label: About
hero.title: Code by day, code by night
hero.subtitle: The person behind Havenkvist Tech — and why this freelance software consultancy exists.

story.label: My background
story.title: A fullstack developer with a nighttime obsession for the frontend
paragraphs: I'm Lucas, a fullstack developer based in Haslev, Denmark. By day, I build and maintain production applications with Elixir and Phoenix LiveView — systems that need to stay fast, reliable, and easy to reason about at scale.

Havenkvist Tech is my evening and weekend project — a freelance software consultancy where I take on everything from small bug fixes and ongoing development of existing systems to entirely new, custom-built solutions. Whether you need a quick fix for a specific problem or want to build something from the ground up, you can hire me for the job.

Splitting my time between two ecosystems keeps me sharp. The discipline and simplicity I value in Elixir shapes how I write React — predictable state, clear data flow, and code that won't surprise you six months from now.
When I'm not at my day job or working on client projects, you'll usually find me refining this very site, reading up on software architecture, or experimenting with new technologies.

points.title: Reliability
points.body: Production experience from my day job means I take uptime, testing, and maintainability seriously — even for small tasks.

points.title: Clear communication
points.body: You'll always know exactly where your task stands. No jargon, no radio silence — just honest, direct updates.

points.title: Modern craft
points.body: Every task is handled with a modern, battle-tested stack, whether it's a bug fix, a new feature, or an entirely new system.

contact.title: Let's get in touch
contact.body: Have a task in mind, or just want to say hi? Reach out directly — I read and answer every message myself.

cta.title: Ready to start a project?
cta.body: Let's talk about what you're building or maintaining, and how I can help.

list.title: Custom Software Development
list.description: Software built from the ground up around your exact needs — web applications, internal tools, integrations, and browser extensions.

list.title: Freelance & Ad-hoc Development
list.description: Already have a system, website, or app? I step in and solve concrete tasks — no long contracts or commitments required.

list.title: Maintenance & Support
list.description: Ongoing technical maintenance so your software stays up to date, secure, and bug-free — without you having to think about it.

addon.label: Optional add-on
addon.body: I'll make sure your software keeps running perfectly. This includes hosting management and domain renewal, so you never have to worry about the technical details.
addon.note: If you choose to handle it yourself, I will help you set up the domain and hosting initially. After launch, renewals, uptime, and ongoing technical updates will be your responsibility.

steps.title: Kickoff
steps.body: We uncover your goals, target audience, and requirements in an initial conversation.

steps.title: Design & development
steps.body: I build the solution in iterations, so you can follow along and give feedback throughout.

steps.title: Testing & launch
steps.body: Thorough testing of performance, security, and functionality before launch.

steps.title: Follow-up
steps.body: After launch, I'm ready with support and further development as needed.

meta.title: Services & Pricing – Freelance Software Consultant in Denmark
meta.description: Freelance software development at a flat 450 kr./hour, plus custom software projects by quote. Bug fixes, new features, integrations, and complete systems — based in Haslev, serving businesses across Denmark.

hero.label: Services & Pricing
hero.title: Flexible help, transparent pricing
hero.subtitle: From quick fixes billed by the hour to complete, custom software projects — no hidden fees, just honest pricing.

tiers.name: Hourly / Ad-hoc
tiers.description: For when you have a specific need — a bug to fix, a feature to add, an update, or a hand with an existing system. No commitment, no fixed packages.
tiers.details: Perfect if you already have a website, web app, or system, but need an experienced developer to fix bugs, implement a new feature, build an integration or extension, or optimize what's already running. You only pay for the exact time spent, tracked fully transparently. This is the core of what I offer as a freelancer — hire me for exactly the task you need solved.

tiers.name: Custom Software
tiers.description: For businesses that need something bigger — a new web application, an internal tool, an integration, a browser extension, or yes, even a classic website if that's what the job calls for.
tiers.details: Tailored for businesses that need a dedicated software project — a booking system, a client portal, an integration with your existing tools (accounting, CRM, or inventory), a browser extension, or a classic website. There are no fixed templates; the solution is built from scratch around your exact needs, with a focus on security, scalability, and an architecture that can grow with your business.
features: Custom solution – web, app, extension, or integration
Unlimited scope, tailored to the task

pricing.note: All prices exclude VAT (moms). Hosting and domain are not included in the project packages — I will gladly help you get everything set up initially, or you can opt for the Maintenance & Support plan to have me manage it continuously.

items.question: Do you work with systems I already have?
items.answer: Yes — that's actually most of what I do. I regularly step into an existing codebase to fix bugs, add features, or keep it moving forward, whether or not I built it originally.

items.question: Can I still get a standard website built?
items.answer: Absolutely. I've shifted my focus to custom software, but if what you need is a classic website, that's simply handled as a project under the Custom Software package.

items.question: How long does a custom software project take?
items.answer: It depends entirely on scope — a small integration might be ready in 1-2 weeks, while a larger system typically takes 4-8 weeks. You'll get a concrete estimate once we've talked through the task.

items.question: Do you offer payment plans?
items.answer: Yes, fixed-scope projects are invoiced in two installments for security: 50% upfront at kickoff and the remaining 50% on final delivery. Hourly work is invoiced on an ongoing basis. Get in touch if you'd like a different structure.

cta.title: Ready to get started?
cta.body: Tell me about your task and I'll get back to you within 24 hours with next steps.
